name: Delete Lattice Data
description: Deletes a value from the user's workspace ('w') or operations ('o') namespace at the given path. Path must start with 'w/' or 'o/' followed by a key (e.g. 'w/my-notes', 'o/my-operation'). Deleting from other namespaces (g, s, j) is not permitted — those are framework-managed. Deleting a non-existent key is a no-op (idempotent). Returns {deleted: true} on success.

path.description: Path to delete, e.g. 'w/my-notes' or 'o/my-operation'. Must start with 'w/' (workspace) or 'o/' (operations).

deleted.description: True if the delete operation completed successfully
